build-hybrid-crawler-v3.title: Build Hybrid Crawler v3: ProjectScraper + Firecrawl Rescue
build-hybrid-crawler-v3.summary: Completed — integrated into FinancialReportApp. 3-strategy crawler: HTML link extraction, Firecrawl map, URL pattern probing. 16 pages for Rubrik (was 2).

build-financial-report-app.title: Build Financial Report App (Railway) — ProjectScraper v3 + Financial Report
build-financial-report-app.summary: Completed — deployed on PowerSpec Docker (not Railway). Frontend :3001, API :8001, Postgres, Redis. 14 bugs fixed, structured outputs, 33 tests, SHA256 integrity.

financial-report-app-refactor.title: FinancialReportApp — Full Pipeline Refactor
financial-report-app-refactor.summary: 14 bugs fixed across 8 files. Structured outputs (Anthropic output_config), 3 blocking quality gates, retry w/ exponential backoff, env validation, crawler HTML extraction (8x more pages), SHA256 output parity, 33 unit tests. E2E verified: CrowdStrike, Commvault, ServiceNow, Rubrik — all 0 'not available'.

sdlc-correctness-first.title: SDLC: Correctness-First Principle + 5 Standing Rules
sdlc-correctness-first.summary: Embedded 5 standing rules across all agent docs: Correctness-First, Output Parity, RCA Core, Autonomous Execution, Dual-Model Planning. Updated PIPELINE.md, DELEGATION.md, INCIDENTS.md, auditor SKILL, financial-report-gen SKILL.

claude-code-auto-mode.title: Claude Code: Auto Mode Default
claude-code-auto-mode.summary: Claude Code uses --permission-mode auto for all coding tasks. Coder + Planner agents updated. Replaces bypassPermissions.

remediation-step-03.title: Deploy JarvisMissionControl to Railway
remediation-step-03.summary: JarvisMissionControl deployed to Railway (acceptable-inspiration project). Public URL: jarvismissioncontrol-production.up.railway.app. Auto-deploys from main branch.

powerspec-tailscale-selfheal.title: PowerSpec Tailscale Self-Heal Watchdog
powerspec-tailscale-selfheal.summary: Windows scheduled task on PowerSpec that monitors Tailscale every 60s and auto-restarts if down. v4 running stable (110+ checks). Needs: final RCA doc, stress test (kill Tailscale, verify auto-restart), git repo + README.

telegram-outbound-selfheal.title: Fix Recurring Telegram Outbound Delivery Failures
telegram-outbound-selfheal.summary: Resolved. Root cause: gateway restarts left Telegram handler disconnected during subagent announce. Fix: cron-delivery-heal.sh + gateway stability. No outbound failures since 3/27 10:25 PM.

financialreportapp-railway-deploy.title: Deploy FinancialReportApp to Railway
financialreportapp-railway-deploy.summary: Cancelled — pivoted to PowerSpec Docker deployment instead of Railway.

mission-control-live-tracking.title: Mission Control: Auto-Track Active Work
mission-control-live-tracking.summary: Added full CRUD API to MC backend: POST/PUT/DELETE /tasks, workspace sync on every write, auto-archive completed tasks >24h, duplicate protection. All 8 test cases pass.

ci-workflow-maintenance.title: GitHub CI Workflow Fixes (openclaw-workspace)
ci-workflow-maintenance.summary: Fixed JSON validation (nested node_modules), removed tracked secrets (data/Tokens.txt), cleaned venv from git, added Node.js 24 env flag. All 3 CI jobs green.

powerspec-rebuild-apr2026.title: PowerSpec PC Full Rebuild (Windows 11 + All Services)
powerspec-rebuild-apr2026.summary: Full PowerSpec rebuild complete. Fresh Windows 11 → SSH, Git, Python, Node, Docker, WSL2, GPU passthrough all working. FinancialReportApp (5 containers) and ContractAnalyzer (5 containers) restored. Tailscale watchdog re-registered. Config files updated.

dell-6k-monitor-setup.title: Dell U5226KW 6K Monitor — Safe Connection to PowerSpec
dell-6k-monitor-setup.summary: Connect Dell UltraSharp 52" 6K monitor (6144x2560 @ 120Hz) to RTX 5080 via DisplayPort 2.1. Last attempt crashed the OS. UGREEN DP 2.1 cable ordered. Cold-plug procedure documented.
